name: Bigtincan Hub API
description: The Bigtincan Hub Public API provides programmatic access to the Bigtincan sales enablement platform, enabling management of sales content, training programs, coaching insights, buyer engagement analytics, and CRM content synchronization.

potentialAction.name: Manage Sales Content
potentialAction.description: Create, update, and retrieve sales content including stories, files, and categories.

potentialAction.name: Training Programs
potentialAction.description: Access and manage training and coaching programs for revenue teams.

potentialAction.name: Buyer Engagement Analytics
potentialAction.description: Retrieve buyer engagement metrics, digital sales room analytics, and content performance data.

potentialAction.name: CRM Content Sync
potentialAction.description: Synchronize Bigtincan content with CRM systems for seamless revenue team workflows.
